privileged_info_summary: The extract_dicom_parameters task uses a real CT Cranium DICOM dataset from the official InVesalius v3.0 GitHub releases (file: 0051.zip). The dataset contains 108 axial slices with 512×512 matrix dimensions and CT modality. The actual in-plane pixel spacing is 0.4785156 mm (not the default 0.957 mm mentioned in setup_task.sh) and slice thickness is 2.0 mm (not the default 1.5 mm). All DICOM parameters are consistent across all 108 files in the series.
